# yazi default-theme icon codepoints (extracted from
# https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi/blob/main/yazi-config/preset/theme-dark.toml).
# 282 unique non-ASCII cps spanning Devicons / Codicons / FA

# One hex codepoint per line, # for comments, regenerate with
